description:
Create a schematic transit map of the downtown Boston MBTA subway network in draw.io using the station list, connections, and official HEX color codes provided in ~/Desktop/mbta_data.txt. The diagram must accurately represent the following connections:
- Red Line: South Station ↔ Downtown Crossing ↔ Park Street
- Orange Line: Downtown Crossing ↔ State ↔ Haymarket ↔ North Station
- Blue Line: Government Center ↔ State
- Green Line: Park Street ↔ Government Center ↔ Haymarket ↔ North Station

Save the editable diagram to ~/Desktop/mbta_map.drawio and export a PNG image to ~/Desktop/mbta_map.png.
